params.label: Populations
params.tip: The cells to connect into a spatial neighbour graph. Pick a segmentation's 'all' entry for every cell, or specific populations to restrict it. The graph is saved as <segmentation>.spatial.h5ad, named from the pick.

params.label: Graph type
params.tip: Delaunay triangulation (pruned by radius), k nearest neighbours, or a fixed-radius graph — squidpy sq.gr.spatial_neighbors.

params.label: Radius (µm)
params.tip: Neighbourhood radius in microns. Used by the fixed-radius graph and to prune Delaunay edges. Centroids are scaled to physical units before building the graph.

params.label: k (neighbours)
params.tip: Number of nearest neighbours for the kNN graph.
